Background.occupation: Junior Project Manager at a civil engineering firm
Background.social_class: Working class roots, currently lower-middle income
Background.key_experience: Working full-time as a night-shift warehouse clerk while completing his engineering degree to ensure his younger sister could stay in vocational school.

Cognition.bias: The Halo Effect; he often assumes that people who are soft-spoken and polite possess high moral integrity and technical competence without further evidence.

Current_State.recent_memory: Spent his entire lunch break helping a stressed coworker find a lost file on the shared drive, leaving him with no time to eat his own meal.
